content: Just as an autonomous Reflexion agent improves its performance over time by storing past trial outputs in dynamic memory and reflecting on failures to adjust its strategy, structured parent testing (test_parent) can be framed as a iterative self-reflective process where caregivers store observations of their child’s developmental responses and update their parenting approaches based on reflected feedback, rather than following static one-size-fits-all guidelines. This framing treats parenting not as a fixed skill set, but as an autonomous agent-like learning loop that gets more accurate with repeated reflection.
